about.label: About
about.lede: Muhammed Safvan builds web products end to end, from the interface to the containers it runs in.
bio: I am **Muhammed Safvan**, a full stack web engineer who builds products end to end. The design in Figma, the interface in React and Vue, the services behind it, and the infrastructure it all runs on.

I work full time as a **full stack engineer**, and I build my own products independently. Right now that is **MediFind** and **Vyntra**, two products I built end to end. Before them, production work for clients across travel, healthcare and industrial safety.
The throughline never changes: **ship the real thing, not a mockup.** Accessible by default, fast, and built to scale past launch.
about._cvNote: All CV data is REAL (French sources translated to English). The /about page reads the unified, de-duplicated `credentials` array (degrees carry their RNCP state titles as `titles` so nothing is listed twice). The legacy `education` + `certifications` arrays are kept ONLY for the unmounted home About exploration variants and can be deleted once those are pruned. The bio paragraphs are grounded in known facts.

experience.summary: Working as a MERN Stack Developer with hands-on experience in designing, developing, and maintaining full-stack web applications. Skilled in building scalable and high-performance solutions using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js, and Next.js while collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable and production-ready products.
points: Built full-stack web applications using the MERN stack
Developed responsive and dynamic user interfaces using React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS
Designed and integrated RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.js
Managed MongoDB databases and optimized queries for performance
Implemented secure authentication and authorization systems (JWT, sessions, etc.)
Integrated third-party APIs and cloud services
Collaborated with teams to design and deliver scalable software solutions
Used Git and GitHub for version control and team collaboration
Deployed applications on AWS, Render, Vercel, and Netlify
Managed Linux servers with Nginx and PM2 for production deployments
Performed debugging, testing, and ongoing application maintenance
Applied modern best practices for security, scalability, and clean architecture

philosophy.label: Approach & Vision
philosophy.statement: Real problems deserve real solutions, engineered to serve people and move them closer to their goals.

stops.name: Discover
stops.title: Listen first.
stops.copy: Before I touch code, I work out who it's for and what done actually means. Half the job is asking sharper questions than the brief did.

stops.name: Define
stops.title: Find the angle.
stops.copy: Most products try to say five things and land none. I find the one idea worth keeping and build everything around it, so people remember it after the tab closes.

stops.name: Design
stops.title: Prototype, don't guess.
stops.copy: I design and prototype the hard interactions in Figma while they're still cheap to change. If it doesn't feel right as a prototype, it won't feel right shipped.

stops.name: Build
stops.title: Build it for real.
stops.copy: This is where I'm strongest. Production UI in React, Vue, Next or Nuxt, typed end to end, accessible by default, fast on a mid-range phone, with motion that actually holds 60fps.

stops.name: Refine
stops.title: Sweat the last ten.
stops.copy: The last 10% is the part people actually feel: how it behaves when something breaks, the bug I kill before anyone hits it. I'd rather spend an extra week here than ship something almost right.

services.label: Services & Toolkit
services.intro: The drum is asleep until you scroll it into view — that's when the first face portals in. Keep scrolling and the next faces swap in the same way.

faces.label: Currently · Frontend Development
faces.copy: Frontend. Pixel-perfect UIs in React and Next.js, typed end to end with TypeScript. Styled with Tailwind CSS, animated with GSAP and Framer Motion — accessible by default, smooth at 60 fps, and built to scale.

faces.label: Currently · Backend & APIs
faces.copy: Backend & APIs. REST APIs and server-side logic built with Node.js and Express.js. MongoDB for flexible data, clean schema design, and the reliable plumbing that keeps a product running in production.

faces.label: Currently · Cloud & DevOps
faces.copy: Cloud & DevOps. Dockerised services and seamless deployments on AWS, Vercel, Netlify and Render. Git & GitHub for version control and CI workflows — ship confidently without breaking anything in production.

faces.label: Currently · Mobile & AI
faces.copy: Mobile & AI. Cross-platform mobile app development and AI integration that makes products smarter. Full-stack SaaS products built end to end — from concept and design through to deployment and scale.

archive.label: The Archive
archive.statement: What's above is the full picture. Two products, built and shipped end to end.

intro.lede: An index of selected projects, built and shipped, not just mocked up. Hover any one to lock its accent and pause its ticker. Click to step inside.
